item.title: Showtime Website History
item.description: For now, this is a gitinfo tryout: (see https://gohugo.io/methods/page/gitinfo/) GitInfo: Gitinfo: AbbreviatedHash: 66a20f3 AuthorDate: 2026-04-29 AuthorEmail: barne.kleinen@htw-berlin.de AuthorName: Barne Kleinen CommitDate: 2026-04-29 Hash: 66a20f31867cbdad3d87a5b6c1717800ad2920d9 Subject: update project-archive
